content:
SFL

LUX


We work with 10,000+ realtors. Yacht, helicopter, luxury vehicle tour.
International clientele - how to cater for
Volume < qualified leads

If ad spend costs $50/ad: what is my take?


To

-do

  • Build other service websites (property management, cleaning, etc.)
  • portuguese translation / contacts
  • Migrate emails
  • Business cards
  • Webpage for ride share lawsuits
  • Anthony domain email
  • get real estate license
  • Richard law site update
  • Luxury presence SEO - what are their services provided for $500?
    • what current service are they providing?
    • why have the past 5 months of services been unfulfilled?
    • setup a meeting
  • update main domain > http://sffluxre.com
  • new photographer to get some new headshots/ pictures to put on the site
  • [REDACTED:EMAIL ADDRESS] email reclaim
  • Budget for ad spend (2k first month and 4k second month)
  • Get David Adderal
  • SOW
  • concierge
